mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_order (order_no, appointment_id, patient_id, amount, order_type, status, expire_time, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{appointmentId}, #{patientId}, #{amount}, #{orderType}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, appointment_id, patient_id, amount, order_type, status, pay_time, pay_method, expire_time, cancel_time, version, create_time, update_time FROM payment_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, order_no, appointment_id, patient_id, amount, order_type, status, pay_time, pay_method, expire_time, cancel_time, version, create_time, update_time FROM payment_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT id, order_no, appointment_id, patient_id, amount, order_type, status, pay_time, pay_method, expire_time, cancel_time, version, create_time, update_time FROM payment_order WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_order SET status = 'PAID', pay_time = NOW(), pay_method = #{payMethod}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, appointment_id, patient_id, amount, order_type, status, pay_time, pay_method, expire_time, cancel_time, version, create_time, update_time FROM payment_order WHERE status = #{status} AND expire_time < #{now} ORDER BY expire_time ASC
